name: Basalt
description: Columnar basalt seen from above, moss creeping over the odd column — the rock face re-fractures with every redraw.

code.style: --column: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 2%; background: var(--column); clip-path: polygon(@rand(22%, 30%) @rand(2%, 10%), @rand(70%, 78%) @rand(2%, 10%), @rand(92%, 100%) 50%, @rand(70%, 78%) @rand(90%, 98%), @rand(22%, 30%) @rand(90%, 98%), @rand(0%, 8%) 50%); transform: rotate(@rand(-8deg, 8deg)) scale(@rand(0.9, 1.06)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
